texto: The evidence knocked clean out of their hands. Nothing but suspicion left…and you can’t arrest a murderer on suspicion, oh dear no! Only felonious loiterer’s and housebreakers and low scum like that. Not an artist in death, like Edmund Alfred Bickleigh, Esq. MRCS, LRCP.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Francis Iles: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The evidence knocked clean out of their hands. Nothing but suspicion left…and you can’t arrest a …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, crime, egotistical pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e egotistical.
